description: sampling zone: undisturbed = stable in manuscript, disturbed = eroding in manuscript, center = lake center in manuscript

flux_type and sampling_zone combined to create groups used in manuscript. Lake_disturbed = eroding lakeshore, lake_undisturbed = stable lakeshore, lake_center = lake center, tundra_disturbed = eroding tundra, tundra_undisturbed = stable tundra
microsite label. Numbered 1-4 in lakes and unique identifier codes for tundra indicating site, sampling zone, and numbered 1-4
net co2 flux in mg C/m2/h
net ch4 flux in mg C/m2/h
ecosystem respiration flux in mg C/m2/h
gross primary production flux in mg C/m2/h
mean volumetric water content (%) for each microsite
mean frost table depth (cm) for each microsite
mean air temprature outside of flux chamber during flux measurement  (°C)
mean photosynthetically active radiation during uncovered "light" flux measurements (umol/m2/s)
Microsite fractional green canopy cover i.e., vegetation greenness (%)
latitude ± 3m (decimal degrees). Locations for tundra rows are for individual microsites (e.g., LBI1), locations for lake rows are for the site (e.g., LB)
longitude ± 3m (decimal degrees). Locations for tundra rows are for individual microsites (e.g., LBI1), locations for lake rows are for the site (e.g., LB)
sampling zone: center = lake center in manuscript
soil layer classification: mineral or organic.
soil total clay content (%), averaged by sampling zone at each site (e.g., LB stable tundra, LB eroding tundra, etc.)
standard deviation for soil total clay content (%), grouped by sampling zone at each site (e.g., LB stable tundra, LB eroding tundra, etc.)
soil total silt content (%), averaged by sampling zone at each site (e.g., LB stable tundra, LB eroding tundra, etc.)
standard deviation for soil total silt content (%), averaged by sampling zone at each site (e.g., LB stable tundra, LB eroding tundra, etc.)
soil total clay content (%), averaged by sampling zone at each site (e.g., LB stable tundra, LB eroding tundra, etc.)
standard deviation for soil total clay content (%), averaged by sampling zone at each site (e.g., LB stable tundra, LB eroding tundra, etc.)
region of data collection location. ABR = Arctic boreal region,
descriptive ecosystem type (e.g., upland tundra, shrub tundra, thermokarst lake, etc.). Defined for this manuscript based on reference site description.

flux collection method. Manual chamber (MC), automated chamber (AC), eddy covariance (EC), concentration gradient (CG), floating chamber (FC), or dissolved gas concentrations (DG). + indicates combined methods to calculate reported value.
mean net co2 flux in mg C/m2/h as reported in literature
standard deviation net co2 flux in mg C/m2/h as reported in literature
mean net ch4 flux in mg C/m2/h as reported in literature
standard deviation net ch4 flux in mg C/m2/h as reported in literature
mean net n2o flux in mg/m2/h as reported in literature
standard deviation net n2o flux in mg/m2/h as reported in literature
